case_title: EURLYN P. MAURICIO VS. EARL DYFOON et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAURICIO, EURLYN P. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANTS NIKKI AND MEGAN DYFOON NOT PRESENT - NOT SERVED. ALL REMAINING NAMED DEFENDANTS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAURICIO, EURLYN P. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DYFOON, EARL DYFOON, MEGHAN NG, BRENDA DEFENDANTS MEGHAN DYFOONA ND NIKKI DYFOON DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. AS TO REMAINING DEFENDANTS, THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH A CLAIM FOR WHICH RELIEF MAY BE GRANTED IN THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MAURICIO, EURLYN P.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MAURICIO, EURLYN P. AS TO DEFENDANT DYFOON, EARL HERNANDEZ, ANA DYFOON, MEGHAN DYFOON, NIKKI NG, BRENDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-04-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DYFOON, EARL
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO MEGHAN DYFOON, AND NIKKI DYFOON BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-26-2010 AT 1:30PM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-04-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANA
CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TOMEGHAN DYFOON.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED FEB-21-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NG, BRENDA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANTS OTHER THAN DEFENDANT EARL DYFOON TO MAR-26-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE NEXT HEARING AS TO ANY DEFENDANTS WHO HAVE NOT BEEN PROPERLY SERVED BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EARL DYFOON ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.
